arts.ttl: Burnley's James Trafford makes Premier League admission amid Newcastle United transfer interest
arts.sum: Burnley’s James Trafford is confident he will be back playing his football in the Premier League season.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning shares Bristol City contract update with eight regulars set to enter final year
arts.sum: Liam Manning has admitted that discussions around extending the contracts of players heading into the final year of their Bristol City deals are at a "loose" stage, with the Reds' energy instead going into the final eight games of the season. First team regulars Anis Mehmeti, Mark Sykes, Max O'Leary, Cam Pring, George Tanner, Zak Vyner, Haydon Roberts and Sam Bell are all set to enter the final year of their contracts at Ashton Gate this summer, as is Rob Atkinson who is currently on loan at Portsmouth .

arts.ttl: Burnley boss Scott Parker responds after being hit with touchline ban for Bristol City game
arts.sum: Burnley boss Scott Parker has accepted he was in the wrong after being slapped with a touchline ban for this weekend’s game against Bristol City.

arts.ttl: Preview: Burnley vs. Bristol City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Burnley and Bristol City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Major transfer window change that may impact Burnley in the event of promotion to the Premier League
arts.sum: Burnley will be subject to two transfer windows this summer if they win promotion to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Burnley dealt fresh Scott Parker blow just days before Bristol City clash at Turf Moor
arts.sum: Burnley manager Scott Parker has been handed a one-match touchline ban and a £2,000 fine for misconduct days before Bristol City travel to Turf Moor to face the Clarets in the Championship. However, former England international Parker will not be joining Manning on the Turf Moor touchline after the FA confirmed the Clarets boss had received a one-match touchline ban after it was alleged he acted in an "improper manner" during Burnley's 1-1 draw with West Brom earlier in March.

arts.ttl: Burnley handed welcome fitness boost ahead of final run-in as Aaron Ramsey set for game time
arts.sum: Burnley’s international players have come back with a clean bill of health – handing Scott Parker a welcome boost ahead of the decisive final eight games of the season.
